phase_name: G-Dimension PWA — Steps 1–5 of Build Order

human_actions_pending.context: Needed to configure PostgreSQL MCP for schema inspection. Find in Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → Database → Connection string (URI format)
Needed to authenticate GitHub MCP. Create at github.com/settings/tokens with 'repo' scope
User ran migrations externally — run the pre-release checklist queries from MASTER_ARCHITECTURE.md Part 30 to confirm

human_actions_pending.action: Run import_nhtsa.js to populate vehicle database
human_actions_pending.context: Run: node scripts/import_nhtsa.js from project root. Requires SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY env vars

decisions.decision: Marketing page served at / via Vercel routes config, React app at all other paths
decisions.rationale: Marketing page stays live during PWA development; vercel.json routes take priority over Vite framework preset

decisions.decision: marketing/ folder deleted, public/marketing.html is the single source
Architecture file renamed from MASTER_ARCHITECTURE_V3.md to MASTER_ARCHITECTURE.md
GitHub MCP added (HTTP transport), PostgreSQL MCP deferred
decisions.rationale: GitHub MCP needed no credentials at install time; PostgreSQL MCP needs Supabase connection string from user

next_action: Build Order Step 5 — Login and Signup screens wired to Supabase auth. See MASTER_ARCHITECTURE.md Part 11 for screen specs and Part 13 for auth flow.
context_notes: All v3 scaffold work is now committed and clean. App.tsx routes match v3 exactly. Tokens include Timeline palette + RADIUS_TIMELINE_CARD. unitConversion.ts handles all unit display conversions (mi/km, hp/ps/kw, lbft/nm). The tuning-dashboard icons folder is ready for PNG assets. Next up: Login + Signup screens (Build Order Step 5), which require Supabase auth to be wired up. Supabase schema (migrations 001-026) was run externally — verify with Part 30 checklist before starting auth screens.
